title: Dark Jedi galleon

{{Quote|I guided our creaking galleon through the hyperspace breakwater known as the Stygian Caldera, which could not have been accomplished without command of the Force.|Sorzus Syn|<ref name="BoS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>}}
Following the [[Battle of Corbos]] in [[6900 BBY]] which concluded the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]], numerous [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Exiles]] were forced to board unarmed '''galleons''' and banished from known [[Realspace/Legends|space]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Deprived of [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] and [[Star map/Legends|star-charts]],<ref name="JvS" /> the Exiles wandered through the stars, guided by the [[Instinctive astrogation|instincts]] of one of their own, [[Sorzus Syn]]. Eventually, the Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] reached a [[Esstran sector/Legends|sector]] unknown to the Republic, which belonged to the fabled [[Sith Empire (Pre-Republic)|Kingdom of the Sith]].<ref name="BoS" /> At least two of the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in which the Exiles traveled<ref name="GAotS2">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 2]]</ref> [[Discovery of Korriban|arrived]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], where the Dark Jedi subjugated members of the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="BoS" />

Later, a faction of Sith Lords<ref name="JvS" /> led by [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Remulus Dreypa]] decided that it was time to take revenge on the Jedi Order and their weak Republic,<ref name="Spiral 2">[[Lost Tribe of the Sith — Spiral 2|''Lost Tribe of the Sith — Spiral'' 2]]</ref> for the purpose of which they studied the [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] of the galleon that had brought them to [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Worlds]] and analyzed the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] taken.<ref name="JvS" /> These Dark Jedi, eager to return, left the Sith Empire on another [[Dark Jedi Starship|ship]].<ref name="Spiral 2" />
